title: A heavy bold P where the bowl's counter is a perfect square, not the typical D-curve. The round outer bowl represents organic business complexity; the square counter shows compile-time precision imposed inside it.
conceptualBridge: The square-counter P means precision inside complexity because the contract imposes exact structure within messy domain shapes.
decision: Rejected as near-duplicate: the square counter — the only differentiating detail — is invisible at 32px, making this indistinguishable from 04-bold-p; avg 4.06 would pass but curated-set diversity requires keeping only the stronger P variant.
